summary: Focused local regression evidence passes for no failure-as-zero, data_status propagation, pending replay, upsert/readback local double, and fail-closed Feishu environment behavior. Live external acceptance remains blocked by missing real Feishu credentials/table IDs and missing usable Qianniu PC CDP session.

D:/tmp/pytest-t08 was not writable in this surface; rerun with workspace basetemp passed.
